title: malva aethiopica
intro: Malva aethiopica, also known as the Egyptian mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malva aethiopica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Malva aethiopica can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
